story: On Tower Road they found dozens of clogged storm drains, a refilled water tower, and, hidden under brush, the hoverboards of The Detonator and Mirage. The man in black studied a bomb, clipped a blue wire, reversed the pump, and rewired the hoverboards to home to their owners, hard-lock and carry them to police.
implausible_knowledge: rewired the hoverboards to home to their owners, hard-lock and carry them to police
question: When his hoverboard rises out of the brush to meet him, what will The Detonator do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Refuse to board and run away on foot.
answer_without_knowledge: Jump onto his hoverboard to make a quick escape.
